import openpyxl
import sys

path = r'C:\\Users\\choiy\\Desktop\\oneul-naliga\\한국투자증권_접근토큰폐기\(P\)[인증-002].xlsx'
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(path\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f'=== Sheet: {sheet_name} \(rows={ws.max_row}, cols={ws.max_column}\) ==='\)
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=ws.max_row, max_col=ws.max_column, values_only=False\):
        vals = []
        for cell in row:
            v = cell.value
            if v is not None:
                vals.append\(f'[{cell.coordinate}] {v}'\)
        if vals:
            print\(' | '.join\(vals\)\)
    print\(\)
")
